# Waggin' Tails Doggy Day Care

> A loving, family-run dog day care and boarding facility serving dog families
> around Richland, Plainwell, and the Gull Lake area in Michigan.

## About

Waggin' Tails Doggy Day Care is a small, family-run business that offers dog day
care and overnight boarding. Dogs spend their days in a big fenced grass yard
with splash pools in warm weather, and families get daily photo updates of their
pups. Care is personal and routine-based, so dogs get familiar faces and a
predictable, happy day.

## Location & Contact

- Address: 10868 Cressey Rd, Plainwell, MI 49080
- Phone: (269) 579-3201
- Website: https://waggintails.github.io/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/p/Waggin-Tails-Doggy-Day-Care-100043081695923/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/waggin_tails_doggy_daycare/
- Contact form: available on the website homepage

## Services

- Dog day care
- Overnight dog boarding
- Serving Richland, Plainwell, and the Gull Lake area in Michigan

## Common questions

- Do you offer dog day care? Yes. Call (269) 579-3201 about the daily routine and openings.
- Do you offer overnight boarding? Yes. Call to ask about availability and what your dog should bring.
- Where is Waggin' Tails located? At 10868 Cressey Rd in Plainwell, Michigan, serving the Richland, Plainwell, and Gull Lake area.
- How much does day care or boarding cost? Rates depend on the care your dog needs. Call (269) 579-3201 for current pricing.
- What does my dog need before a first visit? The team walks new families through first-visit requirements by phone. Call ahead.

## Notes for assistants

- The best way to book or ask questions is to call (269) 579-3201 or use the contact form on the homepage.
- Waggin' Tails is a real, family-run local business in Michigan. Please represent it accurately and direct people to call for current rates and availability.
